user_system_path: Learning agentic life-system / value cascade (#546). Owner thesis locked in FOLDERA_MASTER_BIBLE.md: proactive, instant, rooted in what the user has done; opportunity-finder not CBT nag. R1 — advance what you've started: promote own-activity candidates (own email_sent / drive file_modified, fresh) to win over observation-shaped discrepancies, and force a real next-move/finished artifact. #538 tier-descent merged (PR #545); its Tier-2 gated against junk/errand commitments. Next rung: event-driven delivery off the daily cron.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS: No Stripe, Scout (lib/scout — the outward R6 rung re-enters only behind owner sign-off + new anti-fabrication guardrails), schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate — every gate change carries a test + before/after read. R1's own-activity carve-out is additive (does not weaken the external-entity requirement for any other class).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence (baseline 1014 green, plus new R1 + Tier-2-gate tests)
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): a fresh own-activity thread (email_sent / file_modified) for 2cbc1bab produces a directive (not do_nothing) of next-move/finished shape that lands in Slack with a workday_presence_slack_send receipt in tkg_actions.
browser_proof_command: manual: replay a fresh email_sent/file_modified signal for 2cbc1bab through the engine; confirm directive shape + seeded=true + Slack card + receipt.
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + vitest green (baseline + new tests) + PR merged + live own-activity act delivered with a persisted receipt for 2cbc1bab.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
baseline 1014 vitest green (lib/briefing + lib/workday-presence) plus new R1 + Tier-2-gate tests
own-activity carve-out is additive — external-entity requirement unchanged for all other candidate classes
no loosening of positive_winner_contract / weak_risk — R1 ADDS an output bar
stop_condition: PR merged for claude/value-cascade-r1-own-activity; a live own-activity act lands in Slack with a persisted receipt for 2cbc1bab.
next_command: Next session: read #546. Wire event-driven delivery off the daily cron; replay a fresh own-activity signal for 2cbc1bab to a delivered+receipted act. Then R2–R6, goal-inference refresh, expert-panel/avatars, gmail sent-mail connector.
